name: orioles-magic
description: Baltimore Orioles and MLB news site

scripts.smoke:verify: sh -lc 'test -f dist/index.html && test -f dist/style.css && test -f dist/rss-proxy.php && rg -q "id=\"scoresTrack\"" dist/index.html && rg -q "id=\"articleList\"" dist/index.html && rg -q "id=\"onDeckWrap\"" dist/index.html && rg -q "id=\"mediaWrap\"" dist/index.html && rg -q "id=\"standingsWrap\"" dist/index.html && rg -q "id=\"leadersWrap\"" dist/index.html && rg -q "id=\"readerOverlay\"" dist/index.html && rg -q "id=\"settingsOverlay\"" dist/index.html'
scripts.smoke: npm run build && npm run smoke:verify
